package rulefixtures

import (
	websocket "github.com/gorilla/websocket"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for websocket_without_origin_check: `websocket.Upgrader{CheckOrigin: func(r *http.Request) bool { return true }}` or missing `CheckOrigin`
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario747Negative(allowed string) websocket.Upgrader {
	return websocket.Upgrader{CheckOrigin: func(r *http.Request) bool { return r.Host == allowed }}
}
